## Summary

Describe the profile improvement in one or two sentences.

## Why This Helps

- [ ] Improves recruiter readability.
- [ ] Improves engineering credibility.
- [ ] Improves accessibility or Markdown rendering.
- [ ] Fixes a broken link or stale claim.

## Validation

- [ ] Checked Markdown preview.
- [ ] Verified links are public and working.
- [ ] Confirmed no private or unverifiable information is included.
